title: AllyCraft
description: A tuned version of minecraft with controller support and performance tweaks for the ASUS ROG ALLY and the Valve Steam Deck with shader support
body:
# ✅ 26.1.2
Updated on Friday May 15 2026
Join our discord to get notified on updates!


#


AllyCraft is a bespoke Minecraft mod pack, uniquely designed for the ASUS ROG Ally and Steam Deck. The mod brings a finely tuned version of Minecraft to handheld gaming enthusiasts. This mod pack runs the game much more smoothly and offers seamless controller support, making it the perfect option for portable gaming on high-performance handhelds. Can also be used on desktops!

# Now with shader support!!
Experience Minecraft with shaders on your ASUS ROG Ally & Valve Steam Deck!
> **_Please set your device to maximum power mode for best performance with shaders!_**

Unless you are using a very light shader :)

I deeply recommend [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined). Not sponsored or anything, just really like the shader! (Set it to medium setting in the shader options menu!)


# First launch setup:
1. Set to game pad mode.
2. Download library (it will prompt you).
3. Relaunch!

# The pack has two versions: Midnight Controls & Controlify.
Download RC for Controlify, or RMC for Midnight!
